routing.trackerOnly: Verified evidence that changes a vendor or regulator record but does not justify a standalone story.
routing.alert: New, time-sensitive and operationally material evidence.
routing.news: A significant current development requiring sourced explanation.
routing.insight: Durable analysis supported by multiple intelligence records.
routing.benchmark: A recurring comparison with sufficient normalized records and disclosed methodology.

guardrails: Never infer adoption from marketing claims.
Label vendor claims as vendor-claim unless independently corroborated.
Never invent pricing, deployments, quotes, integrations or regulatory expectations.
Preserve source URLs and an audit trail when records change.
Do not assign a numeric ranking until the methodology and sample are publishable.
